mapper.select: SELECT A.LSN_NUM, A.CLA_NUM, A.LSN_SEQ, A.LSN_TITLE, B.LA_SAVE_NAME, C.CLA_TITLE FROM LESSON A LEFT JOIN LESSON_ATTACH B ON A.LSN_NUM = B.LSN_NUM AND B.LA_TYPE = 'VIDEO' JOIN CLASS C ON A.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE A.CLA_NUM = #{claNum} ORDER BY A.LSN_SEQ ASC
SELECT L.*, A.LA_NUM, A.LA_NAME, A.LA_SAVE_NAME, A.LA_PATH, A.LA_TYPE FROM LESSON L LEFT OUTER JOIN LESSON_ATTACH A ON L.LSN_NUM = A.LSN_NUM WHERE L.CLA_NUM = #{claNum} ORDER BY L.LSN_SEQ ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LESSON WHERE CLA_NUM = #{claNum}
SELECT NVL(MAX(LSN_SEQ), 0) FROM LESSON WHERE TRIM(CLA_NUM) = TRIM(#{claNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LESSON(LSN_NUM, CLA_NUM, LSN_SEQ, LSN_TITLE, LSN_CONTENT, LSN_TIME) VALUES(#{lsnNum}, #{claNum}, #{lsnSeq, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lsnTitle}, #{lsnContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lsnTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE LESSON SET LSN_TITLE = #{lsnTitle}, LSN_CONTENT = #{lsnContent}, LSN_SEQ = #{lsnSeq}, LSN_TIME = #{lsnTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE LSN_NUM = #{lsnNum}
mapper.select: SELECT LA_NUM, LSN_NUM, LA_NAME, LA_SAVE_NAME, LA_PATH, LA_TYPE FROM LESSON_ATTACH WHERE LSN_NUM = #{lsnNum} AND LA_TYPE = 'FILE'
